response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two distinct musical performances, separated by an interlude. 2. Identified the first song as 'Grateful Days' (based on on-screen text and lyrical content) originally by Dragon Ash. The performers are Inugami Korone, Shirogane Noel, and a third performer. 3. Identified the second song as 'Lupin the Fire' (based on on-screen text) originally by SEAMO. The performer is Inugami Korone. 4. Performed searches for the lyrics of both songs using the original composer/artist names (Dragon Ash and SEAMO, respectively). 5. Found complete lyrics for both songs. 6. Mapped scenes to timestamps. 7. Formatted all data into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by VTubers: a cover of Dragon Ash's "Grateful Days" by Inugami Korone, Shirogane Noel, and a third performer, followed by a cover of SEAMO's "Lupin the Fire" by Inugami Korone.

scenes.description: A musical performance of "Grateful Days". Performers are Inugami Korone, Shirogane Noel, and a third performer.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Turn up radio, I can hear it again today,
The stereo flowing, swayed by the wind.
Taking the rhythm on the shoulder, sending the rhyme,
Under the clear sunny sky, we aimed for a distant future.
Master key in hand, depart,
Kick down in the middle of the crowd.
Fighting days I think of now,
Mercy overflowing every time I feel gratitude.
That defensive battle where we sharpened our wits,
Continuing now, this is the forefront.
Undying pride received from my father,
Great care given by my mother,
Warmth I get from you,
To live for tomorrow's sustenance.
I got sound, I got feel, I got beautiful days,
I got song, I got love, I got grateful days,
I got it, yeah.
You make me happy when skies are gray,
Darling, my darling,
Thank you father, mother and my friend.
I was born in Tokyo, raised on hip hop,
Bad-looking guys are generally my friends,
Generally the same as bad-looking guys,
I've seen this city while walking the back streets.
Shibuya, Roppongi, I fell in love with this early in my adolescence,
Left my bag behind at high school,
Really caused trouble for my parents.
But time passed, now I'm on a magazine cover,
Don dada, making my presence felt everywhere,
Once I grab the mic, I'm truly number one,
Tokyo representative, top ranker.
Born in this land, this country,
Jah entrusted me with an invincible mic,
Today, too, I thank my friends, parents, and fans as I advance on this rough off-road.
(Chorus repeated)
Born and raised in the land where the sun rises,
Now treading the earth this way,
Always opening a new page,
Let's go on a journey, to each our own stage.
Spelling out joy and gratitude here,
True understanding playing together,
Describing the era without hiding anything,
Reflecting pressure away.
Pouring in overflowing emotions,
Affection that never fades any day,
Battlefield where I dive in without flinching,
Emblem of the lily that blooms without withering.
Afternoon with a gentle breeze passing through,
Rainbow appeared after this rain,
Water puddle reflecting the sunlight,
Daily joy, praise is here.
Putting the throbbing of this chest into a song,
Feeling what is here every day with these hands.
(Chorus repeated)

scenes.description: Interlude scene where a performer walks and jumps on a platform.
A musical performance of "Lupin the Fire". Performer is Inugami Korone.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let me show you my everything, this dream fantasy, watch it.
It's time to run now (It's show time).
Watch me there, a one-man show, this level of ordeal isn't enough.
What I want isn't things, I steal your heart.
Listen! Party people! I'm racing through life at high speed.
Like a straight descent in skiing, a warhead, stubborn about what I've decided.
I don't know the trick to living slowly, this is a stage, no need to be reserved.
I'll do what I'm supposed to do, aim for the mountain at the height.
Put your hands up in the air!
You who watch that, you're sexy, melting sweetly, just like Chelsea.
The way you brush your hair back with your fingers, my queen.
I'll hold you in my arms tonight, and receive your hot lips.
And more than anything, I want your heart, painfully so.
It's a party night dancin' with us,
Everybody don't stop dance let's go just do it!
Whether it's a thorny road or a freezing night,
Impossible becomes possible when I'm with you.
So, so I get the treasure that no one else has ever had.
I don't miss the prey I aimed at, whatever it is, a great thief.
Calculations up to the very end, ingenious ideas that flash in an instant.
And if you think, "Ah!", I'm already gone.
A stealing aesthetic that's more like art.
(Chorus repeated)
Put your hands up in the air!
Let me show you my everything, this dream fantasy, watch it.
It's time to run now (It's show time).
Watch me there, a one-man show, this level of ordeal isn't enough.
What I want isn't things, I steal your heart.
If someone isn't there, there's no competitiveness, having an opponent makes it unmistakable.
A wonderful rival nearby, competing and getting high together.
It's the final stage, Tennozan, performing with you.
Seriously, tonight it's just the two of us, no complaints regardless of who wins.
Put your hands up in the air!
I'm evil at mastering the Walther, plus alpha, I dislike twisted things.
I'm not just a rap master Jedi, but I have a soft spot for cute girls.
Oh baby, is that acting? Or real? I'm one-track-minded about you.
I'll continue to run on this single path, from today until tomorrow, flying to the sky.
(Chorus repeated)
Let me show you my everything, this dream fantasy, watch it.
It's time to run now (It's show time).
Watch me there, a one-man show, this level of ordeal isn't enough.
What I want isn't things, your heart.
There are friends and family I should love, I must stick to my beliefs and pride without bending!
Let me show you my everything,
Receiving your dazzling gaze, I'll throw away today for you (It's show time).
I want to convey my feelings to you, the only beloved person in the world.
What I want isn't things, your heart.
Usually, I'm the goofy third-rate guy, but when I have to, I'm more serious than anyone.
I want to be someone you can rely on when it counts, someone everyone thinks is wonderful.
Superhuman with intelligence, with my usual superwoman by my side.
Last two bars, last spurt, the man I admire, Lupin the Third.
